sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_time (event_time DateTime64(3), event_date Date) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_time (event_time, event_date) VALUES (toDateTime64('1972-03-05 15:45:30.123', 3), toDate('1972-03-05'));
SELECT toTime(event_time) AS time_only FROM test_time WHERE event_date = toDate('1972-03-05');
UPDATE test_time SET event_time = toTime(toDateTime64('1980-08-15 10:00:00', 0)) WHERE event_date = toDate('1972-03-05');
SELECT event_date, toTime(event_time) AS time_only FROM test_time WHERE event_time >= toDateTime64('1970-01-01', 0);
